name: Invoice Extract Row
description: Single-row re-run: accepts { driveLink, googleAccessToken } via POST, downloads the Drive file, runs OpenRouter nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free extraction, returns { payee, accountNumber, ifsc, confidence, status } as JSON.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ payee: "", accountNumber: "", ifsc: "", confidence: 0, status: $json._status }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $json._openRouterBody ? JSON.stringify($json._openRouterBody) : JSON.stringify({ error: $json.error || "Missing OpenRouter request body" }) }}
={{ $json._openRouterBody ? JSON.stringify($json._openRouterBody) : JSON.stringify({ error: $json.error || "Missing OpenRouter request body" }) }}
